title: QoL
description: (1.21.5+), Adds Quality of Life features that everyone needs in their Survival worlds/servers (will also include some of my other datapacks/mods in here)
body:
Epic QoL Datapack 1.21.5+ Enhance Your Minecraft Experience with Epic QoL!

Transform your Minecraft world with the Datapack for version 1.21.5+! This datapack is designed to streamline gameplay, improve user experience, and add practical features that make your adventure smoother and more enjoyable. Whether you're a seasoned player or new to the game, you'll find these enhancements make a big difference.

Download the Ultimate QoL Datapack file. Place the file in your Minecraft world’s datapacks folder. Load your world or run /reload to activate the datapack. Compatibility:

Designed for Minecraft 1.21.5+, this datapack is compatible with most other mods and datapacks. Ensure you have a backup of your world before installation.

(will also include some of my other datapacks/mods in this datapack/mod)

(email me for questions) "LavishAujla@iCloud.com"
